scripts.build: pnpm run check-node && turbo run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run check-node && turbo run dev
scripts.lint: pnpm run check-node && turbo run lint
scripts.format: pnpm run check-node && turbo run format
scripts.type-check: pnpm run check-node && turbo run type-check
scripts.test: pnpm run check-node && turbo run test
scripts.test:services: pnpm run check-node && (docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Error: Docker daemon not accessible. If you are on Linux, try adding your user to the docker group: sudo usermod -aG docker $USER && newgrp docker' && exit 1)) && docker compose up --build --abort-on-container-exit
scripts.security-check: pnpm audit --audit-level high && (trivy fs . || echo 'Trivy not found or failed, please install it locally')
